projects.title: AI CPA Agentic Research System
projects.description: Intelligent tax assistant leveraging LLM-powered agentic workflows to analyze tax returns and identify optimization opportunities. Built with Python, LangChain, and PydanticAI to automate complex tax research and deliver actionable insights for accounting professionals.

projects.title: Equipment Energy Optimizer (MARL)
projects.description: Multi-agent reinforcement learning system using Proximal Policy Optimization to intelligently schedule manufacturing equipment during peak solar production and off-peak hours. Achieved 25% projected energy cost reduction while maintaining >99% job completion rate through autonomous agent coordination.

projects.title: Autonomous Visual QA Assistant
projects.description: End-to-end computer vision pipeline automating quality control in manufacturing. Combines YOLOv8 for defect detection, MobileNetV2 for classification, and multimodal LLM for analysis. Achieved 99.97% detection accuracy with projected annual savings of $96K through automated rework decisions.

projects.title: Hack 4 Health - Medical College of Wisconsin
projects.description: AI pipeline that converts raw radiology and biomedical reports into plain-language patient summaries (~6th–8th grade reading level) with zero hallucinated findings. Uses scispaCy + medspaCy for clinical NER and UMLS entity linking, LangGraph StateGraph for multi-step orchestration (extract → RAG → summarize → validate → refine), and OpenAI API as the generation backbone. Validation layer combines textstat readability scoring, rapidfuzz fidelity checks, and custom safety/provenance rules to catch false reassurance and invented measurements. Human-in-the-loop Next.js dashboard lets radiologists approve, edit, or reject before patient release.

projects.title: OncoGrid AI
projects.description: Dual-AI population health system answering where cancer rates are rising (macro) and which demographic cohorts face the worst mortality-to-incidence gap (micro). Macro layer: Auto-ARIMA + Facebook Prophet time-series ensemble forecasting 5-year state-level cancer incidence across the US. Micro layer: serverless PyCaret Gradient Boosting classifier (AUC 0.9781) flagging high-risk demographic cohorts. A custom spatial allocation engine joins both signals in Unity Catalog, applying H3 hexagonal indexing and Haversine deduplication to score 83,000+ CDC SVI census tracts against existing oncology centers. Simulated 300-machine rollout: 2,850 early detections vs. 975 under a volume-only baseline — a 192% uplift representing $456M+ in projected ecosystem value. Full Lakehouse stack: Delta Lake, Lakeflow SDP, MLflow, MosaicML, and Unity Catalog. Interface: GPU-accelerated deck.gl spatial simulator (FastAPI + React) and a LangGraph conversational agent that produces evidence-backed deployment memos.
projects.status: Best Deployment - Persistent Systems x Databricks Hackathon 🏆

projects.title: Photosynthesizers - Milwaukee Domes
projects.description: Mobile-first web application enhancing visitor experience at Milwaukee Domes conservatory through AI-powered plant identification. Features BioCLIP classification, GPT-4 health assessment, multi-language support (English, Spanish, Chinese), and crowd-sourced monitoring. Full-stack implementation with React, TypeScript, FastAPI, and Supabase.

projects.title: CoCo: Compliance Open Source Canonical Pipeline
projects.description: Healthcare interoperability platform that bridges complex proprietary payer systems with strict CMS regulations (9115/0057). Ingests member, provider, claims, clinical, and UM data from disparate payer silos, runs client-specific ETL for cleansing and standardization, then transforms the output through a canonical XSLT mapping layer validated by Pytest and W3C XSD specs. Adapters emit FHIR-ready outputs targeting FHIR servers, Snowflake, NDH, and TEFCA. Ships with an interactive React/Vite operations console (CoCoFlow) for schema navigation and transformation inspection, a FastAPI backend for sample builds, and a fully Dockerized runtime coordinating the UI, Express proxy, and API across repeatable deployment environments.

projects.title: Diabetes Prediction ML Pipeline
projects.description: Production-ready machine learning pipeline for diabetes risk prediction. Implements Random Forest classifier with comprehensive feature engineering, statistical validation, and data preprocessing. Designed for clinical decision support with emphasis on model interpretability.

projects.title: Custom Wordle Game Engine
projects.description: Feature-rich Wordle implementation with administrative dashboard, persistent SQL storage, and comprehensive test suite. Developed using Agile methodology with modular architecture for extensibility and maintainability.

projects.title: Automated XML Schema Documentation
projects.description: RAG-powered CI/CD pipeline automating XSD documentation and analysis. Leverages machine learning to extract semantic relationships and generate human-readable documentation, reducing manual documentation time by 80%.
